ratings.comment: She was entertaining and caring about her students. Definitely would recommend.

Dr. Trotter is clear, caring, responsive to feedback, and hilarious. There is a lot of reading, about half of which is necessary to complete papers/projects. Weekly quizzes go over the rest, but you can complete them if you went to lecture. The professor sometimes sits in on discussion sections, and she is just the sweetest. Best professor I've had
